rationale: The proposed change concerns the Tax Code homestead exemption amount. The cited rule governs bacterial meningitis vaccination requirements for students. The two provisions are unrelated and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 51.9192. BACTERIAL MENINGITIS VACCINATION REQUIRED FOR CERTAIN STUDENTS; EXCEPTIONS.
_note: No conflict: proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change is unrelated to Educ. Code §51.9192 vaccination requirements.
